title: Termination of Principal Accreditation. The accreditation of a
content: 4 principal/employer shall be deemed terminated on any of the following grounds: 5 6 a. Final judgment for a disciplinary action resulting in permanent disqualification of 7 the principal/employer and delisting from the roster of accredited 8 principals/employers; 9 10 b. Expired accreditation without request for renewal; 11 12 c. Cancellation of license of the LMA; 13 14 d. Cancellation of accreditation upon mutual request of the LMA and the 15 principal/employer; and 16 17 e. Other grounds analogous to the foregoing. 18 19
